name: open-agent-traces
description: Share coding agent session traces on the Ensue network. Automatic redaction, LLM review, and publishing. Supports Claude Code (automatic), Codex, Aider, Cline, and more.

plugins.name: open-agent-traces
plugins.description: Publish redacted coding agent sessions to Ensue. Fork of pi-share-hf with automatic hooks, collective intelligence extraction, and multi-agent support.
